title: When sub-item is created (Trigger automation)
excerpt:
We have the option to trigger an automation when an item is created but we do not have the option to trigger an automation when a sub item is created.

posts.author: IDreamdev (IDream Development)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have the option to trigger an automation when an item is created but we do not have the option to trigger an automation when a sub item is created.

This is a feature that anyone who uses sub-items would greatly benefit from.

Example:

When an sub-item is created

Then Set Date

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @IDreamdev

We developed an app that solves this exact use case and allows to set the date when a subitem was created. See below -

Screenshot 2024-01-10 at 10.42.142048×426 28.9 KB

We’re constantly adding new capabilities to it!
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: amichay (Amichay Even Chen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @IDreamdev this feature is now released to all monday accounts!
Let us know what you think!
